label: Implementation Complexity
description: Canonical complexity model for deploying a recommendation or executable object in real care.
usageNotes: Use for operational planning and readiness gating.
Complexity is not evidence quality; it is an implementation attribute.

entries.label: Low
entries.description: Requires minimal coordination and standard existing capabilities.
usageNotes: Usually no new training, equipment or workflow redesign.

entries.label: Moderate
entries.description: Requires some coordination, protocolization or moderate workflow change.
usageNotes: Typical for bundle introduction or moderate training needs.

entries.label: High
entries.description: Requires substantial workflow coordination, specialty resources or sustained training.
usageNotes: Often associated with pathway redesign or new capabilities.

entries.label: Very High
entries.description: Requires major institutional capability, governance and operational transformation.
usageNotes: Should trigger explicit executive or governance review.
